blockers: Codex 3B (cross-model browser Playwright re-drive) is env-blocked: the codex sandbox cannot launch Chromium (MachPortRendezvousServer Permission denied 1100). Functional verification done by the repo's own headless Playwright (all assertions green) + cross-model 3A review approve on every slice.

Live-operative web-channel/Discuss conversation (James writing a brief end-to-end) needs the full gateway+operative stack (real claude TUI on the Max account), not stood up in this autonomous headless run. The generic-context/doc-render/XSS + Discuss handoff/recordBrief contracts are covered by committed unit tests; the surfaces are render-verified.

7 pre-existing baseline test failures (seed/validation/memory/gemini/placement) from a concurrent session's memory→basic-memory rename — confirmed pre-existing (stash-verified), not introduced by this run.
